news.headline: Prolonged Iran war to have serious consequences, warns Aurangzeb
news.summary:
<p>WASHINGTON: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb has said that Pakistan is closely monitoring the evolving situation in the Middle East, warning that a prolonged conflict would have serious financial consequences for the country and the wider global economy.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan expecting ‘major breakthrough’ tied to Iran’s nuclear programme
news.summary: A source has told Al Jazeera that Pakistan is expecting a breakthrough tied to Iran’s nuclear programme.

news.headline: Former US Marine pilot loses appeal against extradition from Australia
news.summary: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.

news.headline: Middle East war live: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks Thursday
news.summary: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that leaders of Israel and Lebanon will speak Thursday, after they held a high-level face-to-face meeting in Washington Tuesday -- the first such negotiation since 1993. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

news.headline: Iran Will Be in U.S. for World Cup, FIFA’s Infantino Says
news.summary: The comments come as peace talks between Iran and the United States have not yet resumed and a cease-fire is set to expire next week.
